cit.basis: Flat 15% corporate income tax (Tatimi mbi Fitimin) administered by the General Directorate of Taxes.
cit.note: AI-estimated: standard 15% CIT. Historically small businesses with annual turnover <= ALL 14 million were taxed at 0% CIT; verify current threshold and applicability against official guidance before filing.

vat.note: AI-estimated: standard VAT 20% (TVSH). Reduced/zero rates may apply to specific sectors.

personal_income_tax.note: AI-estimated: progressive personal income tax applies; not modelled in this SME estimator.

metadata.verification_note: RATES IN THIS PACK ARE AI-ESTIMATED AND MUST BE SOURCE-VERIFIED against the official Albanian tax authority (https://www.tatime.gov.al/) before any production filing.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are AI-estimated and simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Small-business relief, sector rates, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
